lockedOutUser.description: Login is blocked with an error message

problemUser.description: Logs in but has broken product images / UI glitches

performanceGlitchUser.description: Logs in but with an artificial delay, useful for timing/wait tests

errorUser.description: Logs in but triggers errors on certain interactions (e.g. checkout)

visualUser.description: Logs in but has visual/layout glitches, useful for visual regression tests

invalidUser.description: Does not exist - used for negative login tests
